title: Quarry Reborn
description: This mod add Quarry which will mine ores in specific radius (7 by default), and consumes energy (6000 per block)
body:
# An addon for  [ Tech Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn)
This mod adds a Quarry which will mine ores in specific radius (7 by default), and consumes energy (6000 per block)

Feel free to test it, and give your feedback!
 
 ## Version <1.20
Version before 1.20 can be found on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quarry-reborn)


## Implemented features:
- Add Quarry v0.1.0
- Use Tech Reborn upgrades v0.2.0
- Config File v0.2.1
- Drilling with a mining tube v0.3.0
- Add excavation mode (mine everything, not only ores) v0.4.0
- Replacing excavated blocks with stone variants v0.5.0
- Custom Quarry upgrades v0.5.0

## Planned features:

- More Quarry tires
 

## Power consumption 


| Overclockers count | Total EU per block | Efficient EU/t | Ticks per block |
|--------------------|--------------------|----------------|-----------------|
| 0                  | 6000               | 100            | 60              |
| 1                  | 10500              | 233            | 45              |
| 2                  | 18375              | 612            | 30              |
| 3                  | 32156              | 2144           | 15              |
| 4                  | 56274              | 7034           | 8               |
 

 
## Upgrades (v0.5.0+)

| Range extender level | Sqr radius |
|----------------------|------------|
| 0                    | 7          |
| 1                    | 12         |
| 2                    | 18         |
| 3                    | 24         |
